title: Prevent accidently modifying Gantt
excerpt:

posts.author: RajeevD (Rajeev)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi, I’m trying to work out if there is there a way to prevent an admin / board owner from using the dragging feature to change the timeline on a Gantt?

This would be to prevent anyone from accidently changing the time period for an item whilst scrolling through.

Thanks for your help!

posts.author: Clarey (MondayMotivator)
posts.cookedHtml:
Workarounds You Can Try:

  1. Remove Owner Role
    If possible, remove admin/owner status from users who shouldn’t be editing timelines. Then use column permissions to restrict who can edit the Timeline column

3

4

.
2. Use Column Permissions
On Pro and Enterprise plans, you can:

  • Click the three-dot menu on the Timeline column.
  • Go to Settings → Column Permissions.
  • Restrict editing to specific users only.
  1. Lock the Board Temporarily
    If you’re reviewing timelines or presenting, consider duplicating the board and removing edit access temporarily.

let me know with a like if this helps or if you DM me if you would like help setting up column permissions or exploring automation-based protections?
